title: Nexus Entity Attributes (Static Compute Params)
description: Per-BlockType static attribute schemas for computable KeyBlocks (V1.61 KB structured layer, compass Q4). Attributes are IMMUTABLE compute parameters (e.g. max_hp, base_atk) stored inside a KeyBlock body. The character shape is fully specified; other block types are permissive placeholders (additionalProperties: true) to be tightened as compute modules are added. Note: 'environment' is not a Nexus BlockType; the combat-relevant computable block types are used here instead.

block_type.description: Selects which per-type attribute definition applies. See definitions for the fully-specified shapes; unlisted types fall back to a permissive object.

attributes.description: The per-BlockType static attributes payload. Shape is keyed by block_type; conform to the matching definition (e.g. CharacterAttributes) for structured validation. Module-declared fields beyond the definition are allowed (additionalProperties: true).

CharacterAttributes.description: Fully-specified static attributes for character KeyBlocks. Additional module-declared stats are permitted.

ItemAttributes.description: Placeholder static attributes for item KeyBlocks (permissive). Tighten when item-compute modules land.

FactionAttributes.description: Placeholder static attributes for faction KeyBlocks (permissive).

AbilityAttributes.description: Placeholder static attributes for ability KeyBlocks (permissive).

SpeciesAttributes.description: Placeholder static attributes for species KeyBlocks (permissive).
